name: Choral Bank
explanation: A fully-polyphonic organ / string-ensemble synthesizer in the lineage of the big paraphonic-string machines. Every key sounds a divide-down full-keyboard source — a stack of octave and fifth partials voiced like an organ's footages — and each note gets its OWN gentle resonant low-pass with a slow attack/release swell, so dense chords each breathe independently. The whole bank pours into a rich four-tap ensemble chorus whose slow quadrature LFOs widen the sound into a vast, shimmering, angelic choir. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Attack, Release, Ensemble, Brightness and Level.
